---
title: "Differential Expression Analysis Results"
params:
  index_data_file: null
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
index_data <- readRDS(params$index_data_file)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

section_heading <- function(data, title, text) {
  if (nrow(data) == 0) {
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  cat("## ", title, "\n\n", text, "\n\n", sep = "")
}

deliverables_table <- function(data, caption) {
  if (nrow(data) == 0) {
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  DT::datatable(
    data,
    caption = caption,
    filter = "none",
    rownames = FALSE,
    escape = FALSE,
    class = "compact stripe",
    options = list(pageLength = 50, scrollX = TRUE, dom = "t")
  )
}
```

# Workunit `r index_data$workunit`

Generated by `prolfquapp` version `r index_data$prolfquapp_version` on `r index_data$generated_at`.

```{r reports-heading, results='asis'}
section_heading(
  index_data$reports,
  "HTML reports",
  "Open these reports first. They contain the interactive QC, model diagnostics and result interpretation views."
)
```

```{r reports-table}
deliverables_table(
  index_data$reports,
  "HTML reports generated by the differential-expression workflow."
)
```

```{r spreadsheets-heading, results='asis'}
section_heading(
  index_data$spreadsheets,
  "Spreadsheet results",
  "Download these Excel workbooks for downstream filtering, sharing and manual review."
)
```

```{r spreadsheets-table}
deliverables_table(
  index_data$spreadsheets,
  "Excel workbooks and their contents."
)
```

```{r ora-heading, results='asis'}
section_heading(
  index_data$ora,
  "ORA input files",
  "Use these gene lists for over-representation analysis in tools such as STRING, g:Profiler or WebGestalt."
)
```

```{r ora-table}
deliverables_table(
  index_data$ora,
  "ORA input gene lists: significantly regulated proteins per contrast and direction."
)
```

```{r gsea-heading, results='asis'}
section_heading(
  index_data$gsea,
  "GSEA rank files",
  "Use these pre-ranked protein lists with GSEA Preranked, fgsea or related enrichment workflows."
)
```

```{r gsea-table}
deliverables_table(
  index_data$gsea,
  "GSEA rank files: all quantified proteins ranked by signed differential-expression statistic per contrast."
)
```
